overview.description: The Strategy Shares Gold Enhanced Yield ETF (GOLY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Gold Backed Bond index. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns through a combined exposure of USD-denominated fixed-income securities, gold exposure, and commodities-based derivatives. GOLY was launched on May 17, 2021 and is issued by Strategy Shares.
